ddls:
CREATE TABLE "community_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the platform was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform the project belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES community_platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_owners" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the owner in the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_resources" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation percentage of the resource to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the community member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the community member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the community member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_tools" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tool */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tool */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tool */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the tool */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tool_members" (
  "tool_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tool */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the community member in the tool */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tool_id", "member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "community_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_platforms" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric in the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id", "platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_members" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the community member in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the community member */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contribution */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_contributions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES community_members ("member_id")
)
column_names: Timestamp when the platform was created
Timestamp when the platform was last updated
ID of the platform the project belongs to
Role of the owner in the platform
Allocation percentage of the resource to the project
Unique identifier for each community member
Email address of the community member
Role of the community member in the tool
Value of the metric in the platform
Role of the community member in the project
